title: Better Ender Chest
description: Customize the rows your ender chests can have.
body:
![better ender chest banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a89e3a496d1c9f2bd1e535ea7d34623e24f27ea7_0.webp)
# Better Ender Chest

**Expand the vanilla Ender Chest into a bigger, cleaner, fully configurable personal storage system.**

Better Ender Chest upgrades the standard Ender Chest experience with more space, better administration tools, configurable menus and messages, and a smooth experience for both Java and Geyser-based Bedrock players.

Built for modern Minecraft servers, it gives players a larger personal storage without adding unnecessary complexity or heavy dependencies.

---

## Why Better Ender Chest?

Vanilla Ender Chests are useful, but limited. Better Ender Chest removes that limitation and gives your server a more practical, more customizable storage solution.

Use it to:

- Give players more personal storage
- Improve survival and SMP quality of life
- Offer premium storage access through permissions
- Manage player Ender Chest contents with staff tools
- Keep everything lightweight and easy to configure

---

## Features

### Bigger Ender Chest Storage
Increase the Ender Chest size from the vanilla 3 rows to up to **6 rows (54 slots)**.

### Fully Configurable
Customize:

- Number of rows
- Inventory title
- Permission messages
- Admin messages

### Admin Management Tools
Staff can:

- View a player's Better Ender Chest
- Clear a player's Better Ender Chest

### Java + Bedrock Friendly
Works cleanly on Java servers and is suitable for **Geyser-compatible** setups.

### Permission Based Access
Control who can use the expanded Ender Chest and who can access admin tools.

### Lightweight and Practical
No bloated systems. No unnecessary setup. Just a focused plugin that improves player storage.

### Automatic Persistence
Player items are saved automatically, so storage remains consistent across restarts.

---

## Commands

### Player Commands

- `/ec` — Open your Better Ender Chest
- `/enderchest` — Alternative command
- `/ech` — Short alias

### Admin Commands

- `/ecadmin <player> view` — View a player's Better Ender Chest
- `/ecadmin <player> clear` — Clear a player's Better Ender Chest
- `/enderchestadmin` — Alternative admin command

---

## Permissions

### Player Permission

- `enderchest.use`  
  Allows a player to open their Better Ender Chest

**Default:** `true`

### Admin Permission

- `enderchest.admin`  
  Allows access to admin commands

**Default:** `op`

---

## Configuration

Better Ender Chest is designed to be simple to configure and easy to understand.

### Example `config.yml`

```yml
enderchest:
  rows: 6
  title: "&5&lEnder Chest"

messages:
  no-permission: "&cYou don't have permission to use this command!"
  player-not-found: "&cPlayer not found!"
  admin:
    viewing: "&aViewing {player}'s Ender Chest..."
    cleared: "&aSuccessfully cleared {player}'s Ender Chest!"
    usage: "&cUsage: /ecadmin <player> <view|clear>"
````

### Config Options

#### `enderchest.rows`

Controls how many rows the storage inventory will use.

* Minimum: `1`
* Maximum: `6`
* Recommended: `6`

#### `enderchest.title`

Controls the title shown when the inventory opens.

Supports Minecraft color codes using `&`.

Examples:

* `&5&lEnder Chest`
* `&6&lVault Storage`
* `&b&oPersonal Storage`

---

## Installation

1. Download the latest version of **Better Ender Chest**
2. Place the jar in your server's `plugins` folder
3. Start or restart the server
4. Edit the generated configuration if needed
5. Done

---

## Usage

### For Players

Use any of these commands to open your storage:

```text
/ec
/enderchest
/ech
```

### For Staff

```text
/ecadmin Steve view
/ecadmin Alex clear
```

---

## Supported Server Software

* Paper
* Spigot
* Purpur

---

## Version Support

Designed for **modern Minecraft versions**, including:

* `1.20.1`
* `1.20.6`
* `1.21+`

---

## Great Fit For

Better Ender Chest is especially useful for:

* Survival servers
* SMP servers
* Economy servers
* Geyser-enabled networks
* Rank-based perk systems
* Quality-of-life focused communities

---

## Optional Integration

Better Ender Chest works fine on its own, but also fits well into servers using standard permission plugins such as:

* LuckPerms
* PermissionsEx
* Other compatible permission managers

---

## What Makes It Better?

* More storage than vanilla
* Cleaner server administration
* Easy permission control
* Simple configuration
* Modern server compatibility
* Focused feature set without unnecessary overhead

---

## Summary

If you want a larger, more useful Ender Chest system without turning storage into a complicated mess, **Better Ender Chest** gives you exactly that:

* bigger storage
* configurable behavior
* admin control
* lightweight performance
* modern compatibility

**Better Ender Chest** is a direct quality-of-life upgrade for servers that want personal storage done properly.

---

## Author

**LinsaFTW**
